div.h2: Per-PID Output Buffer: Preventing Line Interleaving

ul.li: fputs(buf, stderr) → one write(2, buf, len) syscall
Linux: write() to same fd from single-threaded process = no concurrent writer
POSIX: write() ≤ PIPE_BUF (4096 bytes) to a pipe/socket is atomic
For regular files + single writer: stdio buffer aggregation is harmless
Rule: build entire line in outbuf; emit with one fputs() at exit stop only

div.p: snprintf appends ") = 1235\n" into outbuf → full line ready
snprintf appends ") = 3\n" into outbuf → full line ready
